hero.title: Understanding your health, in your words.
hero.subtitle: CLARITY translates medical information into language you can actually understand. Free. Private. Always.

trust.privateDesc: Nothing you share is stored. Your information stays on your device.
trust.forYouDesc: Complex medical research translated into words you understand.
trust.notReplacementDesc: Built to help you prepare for conversations with your doctor, not replace them.

disclaimer: CLARITY is an educational tool. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with qualified healthcare providers.

footer.mission: Every patient deserves to understand their fight.
footer.builtWith: Built with care by humans and AI
